Sub-product 1: W2794P360436Number of packages: 144.29 * 18.11 * 3.94 inches 33 pounds

Sub-product 2: W2794P360418Number of packages: 170.47 * 26.18 * 2.76 inches 33.44 lbs

Product features:

  • This greenhouse with raised flower bed is a practical and space-saving solution for home gardening.
  • Crafted from durable galvanized steel and high-quality polycarbonate panels, it offers excellent UV protection, weather resistance, and a stable growing environment.
  • The greenhouse section helps maintain consistent temperature and humidity, ideal for seed germination and plant growth throughout the seasons.
  • The raised planter box allows for easy planting, minimizes weed growth, improves drainage, and protects plants from pests.
